_comment: REFERENCE SNAPSHOT (captured 2026-05-27) of the hook + plugin wiring from the LIVE per-machine ~/.claude/settings.json on the Windows work desktop. This is NOT loaded by Claude Code — it is the recovery source of truth for the control plane, which by design lives in the per-machine (gitignored) global settings (see CLAUDE.md § Platform). To reconstruct on a fresh Windows box: deploy global-hooks/* to ~/.claude/hooks/, then merge this 'hooks' block into ~/.claude/settings.json. Paths are machine-absolute on purpose; adjust the python.exe path + vault path ({{VAULT_ROOT}}) if they differ.

hooks._PreToolUse_note: The PreToolUse Write|Edit|NotebookEdit -> cn-zero-english-guard.py hook is wired in the VAULT's per-machine .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored) as of 2026-05-27 — NOT in the tracked settings.json (which stays OS-neutral) and not here. See bootstrap README § cn-guard wiring for the per-OS command.

_enabledPlugins_reference._comment: Plugin enablement is also per-machine global state. Captured here for reproducibility; re-enable via the live ~/.claude/settings.json.
